title: Tough As Nails
description: A difficult, survival-based mod that adds body temperature and thirst!
body:
<center>

![Tough As Nails Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58b2a88acb1dd41127aca8b742ddc49105e7ff6e.png)

[![Follow on Bluesky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b0c3f949f4c33cca000d17fc824a547de2bb957.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/glitchfiend.bsky.social) [![Follow on X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/432006270d284b8772e556dc6e5acc874933f311.png)](https://x.com/Glitchfiend) [![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792b68796689b351a2c469ef07c6c709e11197f8.png)](https://discord.gg/GyyzU6T)

[![Support on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3188789dee004c4d427bfc08d77eb25b525b9fb7.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Adubbz) [![Donate via PayPal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed53aa073b5ae94a3933f71ffc54c8a788a4675.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?business=AdubbzG@gmail.com&cy_code=USD)

## Description

#### Tough As Nails is a survival mod that adds various features to increase the game's difficulty, including body temperature and thirst.

### NOTE: THE BODY TEMPERATURE MECHANIC IS NOT AVAILABLE IN THE 1.16 VERSION!

## Info and Terms

### Requires [![GlitchCore Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37eb79bb09c12627dfd1eed79c164c6556eaf673.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/glitchcore) [GlitchCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/glitchcore) for Minecraft 1.20.4 and above*!  Also requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for Fabric version.
_*Also required for 1.20.1 on mod version 9.2.0.171 and above_

*You may include this mod in a Modrinth-hosted modpack as long as you do not rehost the mod and only use builds uploaded directly by us, you do not sell the modpack or additional access to the mod via any means, and you follow any and all terms listed in the license for the version of the mod you are using.*
